_comment: Expo / React Native rules. Loaded when frameworks.*.frontend is 'expo'.

rules.message: Expo uses EXPO_PUBLIC_ prefix, not NEXT_PUBLIC_.
Expo pins React — do not use ^ ranges. Use the exact version from expo's peer dependencies.
Expo 55 recommends expo-sqlite/kv-store as a drop-in replacement for AsyncStorage. Same API, backed by SQLite.
